tags.name: Puncak 701
tags.note: The signboards on top of the peak call it "Machinchang Peak". The real "Gunung Mat Chinchang" seems to be at the top of the cable car though.
tags.source:ele: Director of National Mapping Malaysia, Series L7010, Sheet 150 Pulau Langkawi (1964)
tags.source:name: Signboard at Taman Eko-Rimba Telaga Tujuh
